presentation.title: Program Coach Deck 02 — Venture Design Studio (Interactive)

slides.title: Venture Design Studio — Interactive Workshop
slides.body:
Deck 02 is now an in-app interactive module.

Open Venture Design Studio from the Playbook Day 4 session. Squads work through five guided steps with coach feedback and FEC canvas sync.

Facilitators: use “Open for projection” to display the squad workspace on screen.
slides.speakerNotes: Direct squads to Playbook → Day 4 → Enter Venture Design Studio. Use coach projection mode for screen display. 3 min orientation.
discussionQuestions: Which FEC engine will your squad prioritize first?
